# Gridwise Connect

> Eco Power Energy's grid intelligence platform for planning, estimating and delivering EV charging and ICP connections across the UK.

Gridwise Connect combines DNO datasets, PostGIS spatial analysis, and workflow tooling to take EV and ICP projects from feasibility through pre-construction and delivery. The application is authenticated; only the marketing landing page and sign-in are public.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-in entry point.
- [Sign in](/auth): Authentication for Eco Power Energy staff, clients, and consultants.
